points.title: Blue Whale Watching Excursions
points.description: World-renowned marine wildlife encounters with blue whales, sperm whales, Bryde's whales, and playful dolphin pods in deep offshore waters.

points.title: Mirissa Beach
points.description: Stunning 2-kilometer crescent of golden sand featuring swimming, sunbathing, surfing, beach volleyball, and beachfront dining experiences.

points.title: Coconut Tree Hill
points.description: Iconic Instagram-famous viewpoint offering breathtaking panoramic coastline views, perfect sunset photography, and romantic experiences.

points.title: Secret Beach (Hidden Cove)
points.description: Secluded paradise beach accessed through rocky paths, offering privacy, pristine beauty, and intimate tropical escape experiences.

points.title: Parrot Rock
points.description: Dramatic rocky outcrop featuring cliff jumping, snorkeling, sunset viewing, and panoramic ocean vistas for adventure enthusiasts.

points.title: Mirissa Harbor
points.description: Active fishing harbor serving as departure point for whale watching tours, boat excursions, and authentic fishing culture experiences.

points.title: Stilt Fishing Points
points.description: Traditional fishing locations where centuries-old techniques continue, offering cultural photography and heritage learning opportunities.

points.title: Sri Sunandarama Temple
points.description: Beautiful Buddhist temple featuring traditional architecture, peaceful meditation spaces, and cultural significance for local communities.

points.title: Jungle Beach
points.description: Pristine secluded beach surrounded by tropical vegetation, offering swimming, snorkeling, and peaceful natural beauty experiences.

points.title: Mirissa Fishermen's Harbor Market
points.description: Authentic fish market showcasing daily catches, traditional trading practices, and fresh seafood selection for culinary experiences.

points.title: Turtle Bay Snorkeling Point
points.description: Marine sanctuary featuring sea turtle encounters, coral reef exploration, and diverse underwater wildlife in protected waters.
